constraints: The first valid local-instance clear marks the room globally complete and unlocks coarse shared doors, map access, and teleports
Grant the room's one-time major reward to every eligible connected player, including life-exhausted spectators, without duplicate granting from later instance clears
Players already fighting in another local instance may finish for remaining personal ordinary loot or withdraw to the newly unlocked route
Personal enemies, pickups, unsecured loot, deaths, lives, banking state, and immediate feedback resolve locally
A local death or withdrawal cannot relock globally completed progress
Prevent farming, duplicate major rewards, and permanent disagreement about durable campaign state
Allow future deep shared-objective rooms to opt into stricter synchronization rules separately
After the first valid global clear, players who were not already fighting cannot start a new combat instance in that room during the same run
Players already inside an active local instance may still finish or withdraw under D-195
A player who did not participate may miss the encounter's personal XP because the globally cleared room does not replay for them

When any player triggers a qualifying non-XP reward drop such as a strongbox, matching personal reward drops or grants occur immediately for the other eligible players so they do not miss box-like rewards
Mirrored rewards remain individually owned and must follow each player's unsecured-loot, death-loss, banking, deterministic grant, and save-transaction rules
Global completion, respawn, teleport travel, reconnects, and later entry must consistently preserve the permanently cleared state
Do not allow mirrored drops or parallel instances to duplicate the same reward event more than once per eligible player
